ML_Platform.define: An end-to-end machine learning platform that connects data, training, deployment, and operations.

Data_Ingestion.define: Collects raw application and business events, validates them, and prepares downstream datasets.

Feature_Store.define: Stores reusable features so offline training and online inference use the same definitions.

Training_Pipeline.define: Runs feature joins, model training, validation, and packaging for candidate models.

Model_Registry.define: Stores approved model versions, metadata, and deployment-ready artifacts.

Online_Inference.define: Handles real-time prediction requests and returns model outputs to calling systems.

Monitoring.define: Tracks latency, throughput, drift, and error budgets for the platform.

Raw_Events.define: The original clickstream, transaction, and telemetry records captured from upstream systems.

Clean_Dataset.define: A cleaned and standardized training dataset with stable schemas and quality checks.

Experiment_Tracker.define: Records runs, parameters, metrics, and artifacts so model experiments are reproducible.

Alerting.define: Sends notifications when service health or model quality breaches configured thresholds.
